description_long: This is a small, single-story brick house with a gable roof covered in weathered, mossy tiles. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored bricks, with some areas showing signs of aging and discoloration. The roof features a prominent chimney and is partially covered in moss, indicating exposure to the elements over time. The front facade has a single wooden door with a warning sign, a small rectangular window above, and a round plaque beside the door. The side and rear walls have bricked-up or shuttered windows, ventilation grilles, and some utility fixtures such as pipes and warning cones. The house sits on a paved base with scattered leaves and debris, suggesting an urban or semi-urban environment.
description: A small, weathered brick house with a mossy gable roof, chimney, and a single main entry door, set on a paved base with urban details.
description_view_0: Side view showing a bricked-up window, ventilation grilles, a utility pipe, and a warning cone near the wall.
description_view_1: Front view with the main wooden door, warning sign, round plaque, and a small window above the entryway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another bricked-up window, ventilation grilles, and a utility pipe running vertically.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain brick wall, two ventilation grilles near the ground, and two yellow warning cones.
attribute_entryway_design: Single wooden door with a warning sign, small window above, and a round plaque; no porch or steps.
